description: Windows inventory and baseline security pack for AgentInventory/osquery.

win_system_identity.query: SELECT hostname, computer_name, local_hostname, uuid, hardware_vendor, hardware_model, hardware_serial, cpu_brand, cpu_physical_cores, cpu_logical_cores, physical_memory FROM system_info;
win_system_identity.description: Базовая идентификация хоста: имя, UUID, модель, серийный номер, CPU и RAM.

win_os_version.query: SELECT name, version, build, platform, install_date FROM os_version;
win_os_version.description: Версия Windows, build и дата установки ОС.

win_osquery_agent_info.query: SELECT version, config_hash, config_valid, start_time FROM osquery_info;

win_uptime.query: SELECT days, hours, minutes, total_seconds FROM uptime;

win_cpu_details.query: SELECT device_id, model, manufacturer, number_of_cores, logical_processors, address_width, current_clock_speed, max_clock_speed, socket_designation FROM cpu_info;

win_memory_modules.query: SELECT device_locator, bank_locator, manufacturer, serial_number, part_number, size, memory_type, form_factor, max_speed, configured_clock_speed FROM memory_devices;
win_memory_modules.description: Модули оперативной памяти: слот, производитель, объем, серийный номер и скорость.

win_disk_inventory.query: SELECT disk_index, type, id, pnp_device_id, disk_size, manufacturer, hardware_model, name, serial, description FROM disk_info;
win_disk_inventory.description: Физические диски: модель, серийный номер, объем и описание.

win_logical_drives.query: SELECT device_id, type, free_space, size, file_system, boot_partition FROM logical_drives;

win_video_info.query: SELECT manufacturer, model, series, video_mode, driver, driver_version, driver_date FROM video_info;

win_network_addresses.query: SELECT interface, friendly_name, address, mask, type FROM interface_addresses WHERE address NOT IN ('127.0.0.1', '::1', '0.0.0.0');

win_network_interfaces.query: SELECT interface, friendly_name, description, mac, manufacturer, connection_id, connection_status, enabled, physical_adapter, dhcp_enabled, dhcp_server, dns_server_search_order, link_speed FROM interface_details;
win_network_interfaces.description: Сетевые адаптеры: MAC, статус, DHCP/DNS и скорость линка.

win_routes.query: SELECT destination, netmask, gateway, source, interface, metric, type FROM routes;

win_installed_programs.query: SELECT name, version, publisher, install_date, install_location, identifying_number FROM programs;

win_chocolatey_packages.query: SELECT name, version, summary, author, license, path FROM chocolatey_packages;
win_chocolatey_packages.description: Пакеты Chocolatey, если Chocolatey используется на хосте.

win_patches.query: SELECT hotfix_id, caption, description, installed_by, installed_on FROM patches;

win_local_users.query: SELECT uid, username, description, directory, type, uuid FROM users;

win_local_groups.query: SELECT gid, groupname, group_sid, comment FROM groups;

win_user_group_membership.query: SELECT u.username, g.groupname, g.group_sid FROM users u JOIN user_groups ug ON u.uid = ug.uid JOIN groups g ON ug.gid = g.gid;

win_logged_in_users.query: SELECT type, user, tty, host, time, pid FROM logged_in_users;
win_logged_in_users.description: Текущие интерактивные и удаленные входы пользователей.

win_services.query: SELECT name, display_name, status, start_type, pid, path, module_path, user_account FROM services;
win_services.description: Службы Windows, их статус, тип запуска и учетная запись.

win_startup_items.query: SELECT name, path, args, type, source, status, username FROM startup_items;

win_scheduled_tasks.query: SELECT name, action, path, enabled, state, hidden, last_run_time, next_run_time, last_run_code FROM scheduled_tasks;

win_listening_ports.query: SELECT lp.address, lp.port, lp.protocol, lp.family, lp.pid, p.name AS process_name, p.path AS process_path FROM listening_ports lp LEFT JOIN processes p ON lp.pid = p.pid WHERE lp.port != 0;

win_top_processes.query: SELECT pid, parent, name, path, cmdline, state, threads, handle_count, resident_size, percent_processor_time, elapsed_time FROM processes ORDER BY percent_processor_time DESC LIMIT 50;

win_drivers.query: SELECT device_name, image, description, service, version, class, provider, manufacturer, signed FROM drivers;

win_usb_devices.query: SELECT usb_address, usb_port, vendor, vendor_id, model, model_id, serial, class, removable FROM usb_devices;

win_shared_resources.query: SELECT name, path, type, status, description FROM shared_resources;
win_shared_resources.description: Сетевые ресурсы и общие папки Windows.

win_bitlocker_info.query: SELECT device_id, drive_letter, persistent_volume_id, conversion_status, protection_status, encryption_method FROM bitlocker_info;

win_certificates.query: SELECT common_name, subject, issuer, ca, self_signed, not_valid_before, not_valid_after, signing_algorithm, key_algorithm, key_strength, sha1, path FROM certificates;
